# Reuben Oluwafemi

> Design & Plugin Engineer specializing in React frontend development and custom WordPress plugins.

## About

Reuben Oluwafemi is a frontend and plugin engineer. He builds intuitive, performant user interfaces using React and creates custom WordPress plugins for real-world productivity problems. He combines design aesthetics with deep technical expertise to deliver seamless digital experiences.

## Specializations

- React & modern frontend (Vite, Tailwind CSS, GSAP animations)
- Custom WordPress plugin development
- UI/UX design implementation
- Design systems and component libraries

## Projects

- **Shortly** — A URL shortener with analytics built in React
- **Linksy** — Link management tool
- **Agile System** — Project management and team collaboration system
- **Upthy Pro** — Advanced WordPress Pinterest automation plugin

- Email: reztomoloju@gmail.com
